title: Paintings+
description: adds more interesting and unique paintings to the game, from creepy art to art for advertisement
body:
Paintings+ adds more paints to your world to make the place feel more lively and interesting, currently there is 3 authors and 7 paintings:

**Authors**
- The Man
- The Artist
- The Advertiser

**Paintings**
- Buy
- Money
- Rainbow
- Sad
- Happy
- The Shadow
- Woods
